techniques.name: Hand Vein-Knuckle Authentication
techniques.description: Composite biometric authentication technique that combines hand vein patterns with knuckle shape features for authenticating users.
techniques.requirements: Near infrared camera, Consistent lighting conditions
sources: @article{kumarPersonalAuthenticationUsing2009,  title = {Personal {{Authentication Using Hand Vein Triangulation}} and {{Knuckle Shape}}},  author = {Kumar, Ajay and Prathyusha, K. Venkata},  year = {2009},  month = sep,  journal = {IEEE Transactions on Image Processing},  volume = {18},  number = {9},  pages = {2127--2136},  issn = {1941-0042},  doi = {10.1109/TIP.2009.2023153}}
